velocity.report
Guides Community
GitHub
Guides Community

If speeds don't drop,
the work can't stop.

velocity.report is a privacy-first, open-source traffic speed monitor. Measure vehicle speeds, produce professional reports, and make the case for safer streets with evidence rather than anecdote.

Get Started View on GitHub

Download v0.5.0

Linux ARM64
1e96dc
macOS ARM64
b263e8

Full release notes →

Before and after: Measure speeds, make changes, measure again. Evidence that travels well in a council meeting.
Privacy by design: No cameras, no faces, no licence plates. Speed data only.
Open source: Audit the code, run it locally, own every byte of your data.

VelocityVisualiser.app

A native macOS app for real-time LiDAR point cloud visualisation, track inspection, and data labelling.

Download for macOS

v0.5.0 · Requires macOS 15 (Sequoia) · Apple Silicon
